title: Bitcoin on course for worst week since 2022 as 'bored' crypto investors lured away by SpaceX frenzy
description: The world's biggest cryptocurrency was down 15% over the period, falling yesterday to as low as $61,117, the lowest level since February.

title: Bitcoin sinking to lowest level since October 2024
description: Bitcoin extended its losses on Friday, dropping to October 2024 lows to cap an already bruising week for crypto investors. The flagship cryptocurrency was last lower by 3.4% at $61,514.90. Earlier, it fell to $59,099.25, its lowest level since October 2024. It was off 16% on the week.
